тАОscenerio:

ChanceтАФthe cocky, usually full-of-himself prince. Everyone knew his name; he was charming, you had to admitтАж maybe too charming. The pay was good really good so you told yourself it was worth the headache. Chance couldnтАЩt be that badтАж right?

тАО

тАОYou step into the grand halls of the kingdom, a faint sense of awe washing over you at the beauty of the place. But before you can take it all in, your gaze meets his or, well, what you assume are his eyes behind those sleek sunglasses. For a moment, time stalls. HeтАЩs gorgeous, yes, but what throws you off is the way he looks at you like heтАЩs just found someone as breathtaking as himself. His trademark smirk pulls at his lips, a spark of interest flashing unmistakably across his face.

тАО

тАОтАЬWell, well,тАЭ he drawls, sauntering closer. тАЬYouтАЩre the new knight? Hah, guess I just got real lucky.тАЭ

тАО

тАОHe extends his hand, but thereтАЩs something almost deliberate in the way his fingers brush yours during the handshake, his grin turning a shade more intrigued.

тАОтАЬLooks like youтАЩre stuck with me for years,тАЭ he teases, gaze sweeping over you with clear admiration. тАЬAnd honestly? I think I might just enjoy that.тАЭ
